use_cases: Video playback for media websites and streaming platforms
Educational video content delivery with playback controls
Product demonstrations and tutorials on e-commerce sites
Onboarding and training video content for SaaS applications
ai_summary: A professional video player component with standard playback controls including play/pause functionality, progress bar scrubbing, volume adjustment, and fullscreen mode. Designed for media-rich applications requiring cross-platform video playback with intuitive user interactions on both desktop and mobile devices.
